questions: You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. Your new business partner handles a major transaction without consulting you first. How do you react when they tell you about it?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. A friend promises to keep a sensitive secret you shared with them. How do you feel after telling them?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. Your employee asks to work from home for the week without much explanation. What's your response?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. A contractor gives you an estimate for home repairs and says they can start immediately. How do you proceed?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. Your partner says they ran into their ex at the store and chatted briefly. How do you respond?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. A new babysitter comes highly recommended by friends and seems great during the interview. How do you feel leaving your child with them for the first time?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. A colleague promises they'll have their portion of the project done by Friday. How do you plan around that?
You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. Your mechanic says you need a repair that you can't verify yourself. What do you do?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. Your teenager says they're sleeping at a friend's house and you've met the friend's parents once. How do you handle it?

You're someone who verifies everything independently and assumes people will let you down until proven otherwise. A neighbor offers to watch your house and water your plants while you're on vacation. How do you feel about it?
